creator: srlemke@protonmail.com
text:
True, happens only if using OpenGL 3.1 or 2.0, with Xrender it works fine:

pciconf -lv
vgapci1@pci0:0:2:0:     class=0x030000 card=0x06e51028 chip=0x191b8086 rev=0x06 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Intel Corporation'
    device     = 'HD Graphics 530'
    class      = display
    subclass   = VGA

Looks more like a X problem.
